geopolitics_summary: Iran war drives EU fossil fuel cost surge; Russia shadow fleet sanctions escalate; Libya gas pivot signals supply chain disruption risk.

themes.headline: Italy seeks Libyan gas to offset Iran war supply disruption
themes.why_it_matters: Direct TTF risk. Iran war disrupts traditional supply; Libya ramp-up capacity-constrained. Near-term gas availability tightens, pushing power generation input costs higher and squeezing Cal+1 spreads.

themes.headline: EU sanctions blitz on Russia shadow fleet, banks, military suppliers
themes.why_it_matters: Tightens Russian energy trade channels; reduces Urals crude and gas export optionality, raising LNG arb premium for NW Europe. Indirect: supports TTF through reduced Russian LNG competition and crude-to-power fuel-switch economics.

themes.headline: Portugal accelerates fossil fuel phase-out after Iran war cost spike
themes.why_it_matters: Policy signal: Iran war cost shock drives renewable acceleration in EU. Supports long-term structural bearish-power (more wind/solar capacity). Near-term: demonstrates political urgency around energy security, could fast-track grid investment and capacity auctions.

themes.headline: EU Commission weakens methane enforcement rules under US pressure
themes.why_it_matters: Regulatory relief for oil/gas operators lowers abatement cost. May marginally increase gas supply and reduce TTF. Combined with draft exemptions for 'energy security,' weakens carbon/methane discipline and caps upside on EUA from tightened scope.

themes.headline: Lufthansa braces for €1.7bn annual jet fuel cost impact
themes.why_it_matters: Indirect: jet fuel crisis (kerosene link to crude/distillate) signals sustained distillate tightness. High transport fuel costs pressurize power-sector fuel procurement and grid operating costs; may shift demand toward lower-cost marginal units.

watchlist: Libyan gas production ramp timeline and pipeline integrity to Italy—critical for TTF curve May–Jun.
EU methane rule exemptions finalization (energy security carve-out)—may unlock marginal gas supply.
France Hormuz security mission scope—potential impact on Middle East oil/LNG export routes.
Portugal renewables capacity auction schedule—signal of EU-wide fast-track policy.
